title: Video Game History Foundation Library
creator: Video Game History Foundation
description: A research library for digitized game magazines, development material, ephemera, and catalogued archival collections.
useful: A starting point for historical research that depends on primary documents rather than retrospective summaries.
audience: Researchers, writers, developers, and curious players looking for primary historical material.
learning: Search digitized magazines and archival holdings
Distinguish primary documents from later summaries
Build evidence for historical research questions
